title: Rolson 59159 Archimedean Drill
features: Ideal for small drill bits upto 1mm
A small spiral type hand drill, which is operated by pushing centrepiece up and down
description: From the manufacturer Feature Rolson Tools continually look to bring someone good innovative products, all at the good possible margins and there is no different. To date, we have over 250 good exciting and good products to whet someone's appetite, together with a host of good in store packaging and point of good material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal. About Us The Rolson marketing team have sought good ways to package our good and existing lines. We bring good product combinations which give a good impact.
